steps.title: Spot the location detail to emphasize
steps.content: The notes specify that the figure in New Day Coming is “floating on the left side of the canvas” — the location detail the question asks us to emphasize.

steps.title: Match the location to the choices
steps.content: Choice B directly states the figure is “depicted on the left side of the canvas” — capturing the exact location detail. Choices A, C, and D focus on mood, water colors, and painting dimensions respectively. That matches choice B — B is correct.
